examples.title: File Copy Program
examples.description: Copies contents from source file to destination file character by character
examples.explanation: Opens source in read mode and destination in write mode. Reads each character using fgetc() until EOF, writes to destination using fputc(). Checks for errors using ferror(). Closes both files.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) where n is file size

examples.title: Count Lines in File
examples.description: Reads a file and counts the number of lines
examples.explanation: Opens file in read mode. Iterates through each character using fgetc(). Increments counter whenever newline character is encountered. Uses ftell() to check if file was non-empty and handle last line without newline.

examples.title: Student Record Management
examples.description: Writes and reads student records to/from a file
examples.explanation: Defines Student structure. writeRecords() opens file in write mode and stores student data using fprintf(). readRecords() reads file sequentially using fscanf() and displays all records. Loop continues until fscanf() cannot read 3 items (reaches EOF or error).
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) for both read and write, n = number of records

examples.title: File Search Operation
examples.description: Searches for a specific roll number in student records
examples.explanation: Uses rewind() to position at beginning of file. Reads records sequentially using fscanf() in a loop. Compares each roll number with search key. Returns found status. Demonstrates sequential search in ordered file.
examples.timeComplexity: O(n) worst case, n = number of records
